title: Brand Manager

rationales.taskAutomation: Competitive tracking, brand-guideline documentation, and research synthesis are automatable, but positioning decisions and creative judgment gate most of the role's core work.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI marketing analytics and content tools are mature, widely-shipped products, though brand strategy itself has no dedicated automation category.
rationales.adoption: AI-assisted research and tracking are common at large CPG and tech brands, spreading to mid-market.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run competitive-tracking and guideline-documentation workflows, but brand positioning and creative direction stay with the manager.

tasksAtRisk: Brand guideline documentation and asset audits
Research synthesis for brand health studies
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 11-2021 Marketing Managers (closest match), p25-p75 rounded
insight: AI now handles the competitive tracking and documentation that used to eat a brand manager's week. The job increasingly is positioning strategy and creative judgment, which is exactly what AI can't originate.
